headline: Jim Cramer Says “This Is a Good Moment to Buy” GE Aerospace
summary: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money recently as he recapped mega-cap tech earnings. A caller sought Cramer’s opinion of the stock, and in response, he said: I think you should buy it right here. Enough is enough. It’s been going down because people are worried about air travel. I […]
